scripts:
create service user guides-reader-service with path /home/users/system/cq:services/guides
set ACL for guides-reader-service
 allow jcr:read on /content
end
create service user guides-writer-service with path /home/users/system/cq:services/guides

set ACL for guides-writer-service
 allow jcr:versionManagement,jcr:read,rep:write,jcr:lockManagement,crx:replicate on /content
 allow jcr:read on /apps/guides-components/clientlibs/clientlib-hfm
end

set ACL for everyone
 allow jcr:read,rep:write on /content
 allow jcr:read on /apps/guides-components
end
